name: ACLED
methodology: Trained researchers code conflict events from local, regional, national, and international media. Peer-reviewed coding methodology.

name: NASA FIRMS
fullName: Fire Information for Resource Management System
methodology: VIIRS (Visible Infrared Imaging Radiometer Suite) satellite sensors detect thermal anomalies at 375m resolution.
coverage: Global — filtered to ME bounding box

name: GDELT
fullName: Global Database of Events, Language, and Tone
methodology: Machine-translated news monitoring from 100+ languages. Tone analysis using sentiment algorithms.

name: EIA
methodology: Official US government energy statistics. Brent and WTI spot prices from trading exchanges.

name: USGS
methodology: Global seismograph network. Magnitude, depth, and location computed from multiple sensor stations.

name: Airplanes.live
methodology: Crowd-sourced ADS-B receiver network. Multi-point 250 nm queries cover the Middle East theater. Heading vectors projected 10 min forward.

name: OpenSky Network
methodology: Authenticated OAuth2 client. Worldwide /states/all query supplements airplanes.live with origin-country, emitter category, and SPI metadata. 4,000 daily API credits (OPENSKY_API_DEFAULT).
coverage: Global — theater bbox filter applied server-side

name: Intelligence RSS Feeds
url: Multiple (BBC, Al Jazeera, Reuters, AP, etc.)
methodology: Aggregated RSS feeds from 16+ vetted international news sources. Keyword-scored and source-weighted.

name: ReliefWeb
methodology: UN-curated humanitarian information from field operations, government reports, and partner agencies.

name: Copernicus / Sentinel Hub
methodology: ESA Sentinel-2 multispectral imagery at 10m resolution. True color and NDVI processing via evalscripts.

name: NASA GIBS
methodology: Pre-rendered map tiles from NASA satellite products (VIIRS, MODIS, etc.). Public access, no credentials required.

name: Market Data
methodology: Real-time prices from multiple financial data providers via CORS proxy chain. Crypto from Binance WebSocket.
coverage: Commodities, indices, crypto, FX — war-relevant symbols

name: Curated Intelligence
methodology: Verified data compiled from SIPRI, UNHCR, CSIS, IAEA, and open-source intelligence. Updated by analysts.
coverage: Conflict milestones, sanctions, nuclear facilities, key figures, actor networks, war costs, displacement
